Transcrição Completa: 14 How To Be Comfortable With Failure

 

[00:00]"When you first get started, the power of learning lessons from failure is one of your biggest coaches in the game. Okay?"

 

[00:06]"As soon as you first start getting experience, you are going to take some vicious L's and you got to get very comfortable with it."

 

[00:14]"No matter what, maybe you lose a relationship, maybe you got a deal and you absolutely fucked it up, you know, crashed and burned."

 

[00:22]"Rather than that destroying you, depleting you, taking your energy away, making you look at life in a negative pessimistic perspective."

 

[00:31]"You got to learn to harness the power of the lessons that are gifted to you on your journey to success and prosperity."

 

[00:38]"Under any and all circumstances, you have to have an inherent natural belief in you that prosperity and absolutely under all conditions, flourish and prospering are your two biggest objective no matter what. Okay?"

 

[00:54]"Daily rejection from the amount of sales that you're going to be putting out there, the lack of responses you're going to get, that can't burden you."

 

[01:04]"You getting a client, fucking it up, having a crash and burn situation, that can't burden you. That's a part of the game."

 

[01:11]"And you've got to continue moving and continue learning."

 

[01:15]"Here's the hard part about lessons. If you don't learn them, you got to relearn them again in a greater way."

 

[01:22]"Therefore, each time that you fail, each time that you win, at the end of every day, please take this lesson more seriously than anything else."

 

[01:30]"This goes for all areas of life."

 

[01:33] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Daily Reflection System"

 

NÚMEROS: 10:00 PM, 7:00 AM

 

VISUAL: Sistema de notificações diárias, horários específicos destacados, conceito de reflexão estruturada e foco matinal

 

[01:33]"At 10:00 p.m. every night, no matter the coast I'm on in the world, I have a notification that goes off that says, 'Stop and reflect on the truth and lessons learned today.'"

 

[01:46]"At 7:00 a.m. every morning, I get a notification that goes off in my phone that says, 'There is no room for error in affluence. Stay focused.'"

 

[01:56]"And it triggers me to go and bust out my journal where I do thinking time comes from a book, The Road Less Stupid by Keith Cunningham, very successful mentor, coach, and more importantly, business person."

 

[02:11] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Thinking Time Methodology"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Referência ao livro "The Road Less Stupid" de Keith Cunningham, metodologia de journaling, conceito de tempo dedicado ao pensamento estratégico

 

[02:11]"What he teaches us is an ability to reflect on the lessons that we are learning in every day both in failure and in success."

 

[02:20]"All of a sudden after a few weeks you'll have a document that you can constantly refer back to that is your self-reflections on the lessons that you've learned so you can repeat successful actions and so you can avoid the failures that you've come across in life."

 

[02:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Tragedy as Growth Opportunity"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Conceito de transformação de tragédia em oportunidade, mindset de crescimento através da adversidade

 

[02:35]"Every time you take a vicious L, use it. Remember this quote. Tragedy should trigger an opportunity for you to grow."

 

[02:44]"Beat the hell out of that tragedy and don't ever let it happen again, but do it by learning the lessons from it."

 

[02:50]"Some great opportunities here for you to grow. Ask yourself the right questions to get the right answers."

 

[02:57] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Questions Control Focus - Tony Robbins"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Citação de Tony Robbins, conceito de perguntas direcionando foco mental, framework de auto-questionamento estratégico

 

[02:57]"When you prompt yourself the right questions, you're going to trigger your brain to think in that particular area."

 

[03:04]"Focus controls questions, as Tony Robbins says. Questions control focus, as Tony Robbins says."

 

[03:11]"So, when you're reflecting and you're asking yourself questions, what you're really doing is controlling where your focus goes so you can get more honed in, more focused on the kill, and more successful, more importantly than anything else."

 

[03:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "The Cycle of Repeated Failure"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Ciclo crescente de falhas repetidas, conceito de consequências amplificadas, padrão de ignorar lições levando a problemas maiores

 

[03:25]"You would absolutely be miserable if every time you learned a lesson, you completely ignored the value of what you could have learned to avoid repeating it."

 

[03:35]"And all of a sudden, it happens again to you in a greater way. And you ignore it again, and it happens to you again in a greater way. In a greater way."

 

[03:43]"Every time you fail with a client, if you ignore the lessons of why you failed, you are going to repeat it and it's probably going to happen in a greater way."

 

[03:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Flourish and Prosper Under All Circumstances"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Mindset de prosperidade incondicional, resiliência diante de rejeição diária, conceito de não permitir que falhas destruam o momentum

 

[03:52]"Don't let failing with a client or getting daily rejection from not getting responses or getting nos or just getting people that say, 'I'm flat out not interested.' Don't let that burn you down."

 

[04:04]"Flourish and prosper under all circumstances. Deal with daily rejection."

 

[04:09]"Deal with it, learn from it, and more importantly, reflect on it."

 

[04:13] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "The Journal of Success and Failure"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado numericamente

 

VISUAL: Conceito de documento vivo de aprendizados, asset pessoal autocriado, repositório de sucessos e falhas para referência constante

 

[04:13]"And have that powerful journal of successes and failures so you can constantly refer back to it. One of the greatest assets you'll ever have that you self-create."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

10:00 PM - Horário de reflexão diária noturna

7:00 AM - Horário de foco matinal

Algumas semanas - Tempo para criar documento valioso de reflexões

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Sistema de notificações diárias (10 PM e 7 AM)

Metodologia "Thinking Time" de Keith Cunningham

Journaling estruturado de sucessos e falhas

Framework de auto-questionamento estratégico

Ciclo de reflexão diária para evitar repetição de erros

Técnica de transformar tragédia em oportunidade de crescimento

Uso de perguntas direcionadas para controlar foco mental

 

ESTRUTURA:

Reflexão noturna: "Stop and reflect on the truth and lessons learned today"

Foco matinal: "There is no room for error in affluence. Stay focused"

Baseado no livro "The Road Less Stupid" de Keith Cunningham

Filosofia Tony Robbins: "Questions control focus"

Mindset core: "Flourish and prosper under all circumstances"

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não especificado

 

CONCEITOS-CHAVE:

Falha como maior coach no início da jornada

Conforto com "vicious L's" (grandes perdas)

Lições não aprendidas retornam amplificadas

Rejeição diária como parte inevitável do processo

Journal como um dos maiores assets autocriados

Prosperidade incondicional independente de circunstâncias

 

DURAÇÃO: ~4:20 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/motivacional sobre mindset e desenvolvimento pessoal em vendas
